Mi Youren

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Cloudy Mountains (Mi Youren)
by Mi Youren
Southern Song · Mi Youren · 1130
A handscroll of mist-wrapped peaks, executed in the "Mi dots" technique his father invented — layered wet blobs of ink building volume through atmospheric haze alone.
←Lucas Cranach, the Younger Ma Yuan→
